# Support

Krow provides support through the following channels. Choose the one that best matches your needs.

## GitHub Issues

Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/krowft/Krow/issues) for:

- Bug reports
- Feature requests
- Technical questions related to specific repositories

Before opening a new issue, search existing ones to avoid duplicates.

## GitHub Discussions

Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/krowft/krowft/discussions) for:

- General questions
- Ideas and proposals
- Show and tell
- Community announcements

## Documentation

- Official website: [krow-mocha.vercel.app](https://krow-mocha.vercel.app/)
- Repository documentation: Check the `README.md` and `docs` folder of each project

## Discord Community

Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/aa3HPzyVv) for:

- Real-time community support
- Engineering discussions
- Announcements and updates

## Response Expectations

- Issues: We aim to respond within a few business days.
- Discussions: Community and maintainer participation.
- Discord: Response times vary by channel activity.

We appreciate your patience and contributions.
